title: DeadSummons
description: This adds Magic of evil. We have three magic types, one boss. and items for your world!
body:
Welcome to the DeadSummon Mod We Now Have A Release verison With little bug of know. If you are new to this mod This adds Magic of evil. Because of the first release We have three magic types, one boss. and items.

This Mod going to need more time to fix some small bugs but I had made ways in the game to fix these bugs, some of the bugs I do not know so make sure to tell me. I work this mod by myself so pls wait for updates!

Important:

If you get your cooldown still in cooldown, because you left the game when the spell was on cooldown still, just create the forcefix item, that can be also use to skip the cooldown :)
